publishedAbstract: - On this document we provide the procedure to increase or decrease the level of the debug logs on OCS pods The higher number, the more verbosity of debug logs. **NOTE.** The recommended log level is set as default in the different components. Developers have considered the amount of logging, and deem it required information for most issues that can occur. Customers can reduce the log level if they prefer, but they need to understand that it may not be possible to troubleshoot certain problems that could occur. It may be required to increase the log level again in order to identify and address issues.
publishedTitle: OCS / ODF 4.X - How to change the debug log level on openshift-storage pods
